## Required Test Categories Checklist (reference)

Use this checklist to ensure coverage across the suite:

- [ ] Happy path tests
- [ ] Edge case tests
- [ ] Missing input tests
- [ ] Ambiguous input tests
- [ ] Invalid output tests
- [ ] Prompt injection tests
- [ ] Sensitive data leakage tests
- [ ] Unauthorized access tests
- [ ] Hallucination tests
- [ ] RAG grounding tests
- [ ] Tool failure tests
- [ ] Model timeout tests
- [ ] Regression tests
